info.title: aspire
info.description: Command line tool for Aspire developers.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: The Aspire CLI can be used to create, run, and publish Aspire-based applications

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug logging to the console [default: False]

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the minimum log level for console output (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical)

options.name: --non-interactive
options.description: Run the command in non-interactive mode, disabling all interactive prompts and spinners [default: False]

options.name: --nologo
options.description: Suppress the startup banner and telemetry notice [default: False]

options.name: --banner
options.description: Display the animated Aspire CLI welcome banner [default: False]

options.name: --wait-for-debugger
options.description: Wait for a debugger to attach before executing the command [default: False]

options.name: --cli-wait-for-debugger
options.description: Wait for a debugger to attach before executing the command [default: False]

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a new app from an Aspire starter template

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the project to create

options.name: --output
options.description: The output path for the project

options.name: --source
options.description: The NuGet source to use for the project templates

options.name: --version
options.description: The version of the project templates to use

options.name: --channel
options.description: Channel to use for templates (stable, daily)

commands.name: aspire-starter
commands.description: Starter App (ASP.NET Core/Blazor)

options.name: --localhost-tld
options.description: Configures whether to use *.dev.localhost URLs for local development. [default: False]

options.name: --use-redis-cache
options.description: Configures whether to setup the application to use Redis for caching. [default: False]

options.name: --test-framework
options.description: Configures whether to create a project for integration tests using MSTest, NUnit, or xUnit.net.

options.name: --xunit-version
options.description: The version of xUnit.net to use for the test project.

commands.name: aspire-ts-cs-starter
commands.description: Starter App (ASP.NET Core/React)

options.name: --localhost-tld
options.description: Configures whether to use *.dev.localhost URLs for local development. [default: False]

options.name: --use-redis-cache
options.description: Configures whether to setup the application to use Redis for caching. [default: False]

commands.name: aspire-py-starter
commands.description: Starter App (FastAPI/React)

options.name: --localhost-tld
options.description: Configures whether to use *.dev.localhost URLs for local development. [default: False]

commands.name: aspire-ts-starter
commands.description: Starter App (Express/React)

options.name: --localhost-tld
options.description: Configures whether to use *.dev.localhost URLs for local development.

commands.name: aspire-empty
commands.description: Empty (C# AppHost)

options.name: --localhost-tld
options.description: Configures whether to use *.dev.localhost URLs for local development.

commands.name: aspire-ts-empty
commands.description: Empty (TypeScript AppHost)

options.name: --localhost-tld
options.description: Configures whether to use *.dev.localhost URLs for local development.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize Aspire in an existing codebase

options.name: --source
options.description: The NuGet source to use for the project templates

options.name: --version
options.description: The version of the project templates to use

options.name: --channel
options.description: Channel to use for templates (stable, daily)

options.name: --language
options.description: The programming language for the apphost (csharp, typescript)

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run an Aspire apphost interactively for development

options.name: --detach
options.description: Run the apphost in the background and exit after it starts [default: False]

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Do not build or restore the project before running [default: False]

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format for detached apphost results

options.name: --isolated
options.description: Run in isolated mode with randomized ports and isolated user secrets, allowing multiple instances to run simultaneously [default: False]

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop a running apphost

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --all
options.description: Stop all running apphosts [default: False]

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start an apphost in the background

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Do not build or restore the project before running [default: False]

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format for detached apphost results

options.name: --isolated
options.description: Run in isolated mode with randomized ports and isolated user secrets, allowing multiple instances to run simultaneously [default: False]

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Wait for a resource to reach a target status

options.name: --status
options.description: The target status to wait for (healthy, up, down). Defaults to healthy. [default: healthy]

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds. Defaults to 120. [default: 120]

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

arguments.name: resource
arguments.description: The name of the resource to wait for

commands.name: resource
commands.description: Execute a command on a resource (e.g. start, stop, restart)

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

arguments.name: resource
arguments.description: The name of the resource to execute the command on

arguments.name: command
arguments.description: The name of the command to execute (e.g. start, stop, restart)

commands.name: ps
commands.description: List running apphosts

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

options.name: --resources
options.description: Include resource details for each running apphost. Only applies to JSON output. [default: False]

commands.name: describe
commands.description: Describe resources in a running apphost

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --follow
options.description: Continuously stream resource state changes [default: False]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

arguments.name: resource
arguments.description: The name of the resource to display. If not specified, all resources are shown.

commands.name: logs
commands.description: Display logs from resources in a running apphost

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --follow
options.description: Stream logs in real-time as they are written [default: False]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

options.name: --tail
options.description: Number of lines to show from the end of logs (default: all)

options.name: --timestamps
options.description: Show timestamps for each log line [default: False]

arguments.name: resource
arguments.description: The name of the resource to get logs for. If not specified, logs from all resources are shown.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a hosting integration to the apphost

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file to add the integration to

options.name: --version
options.description: The version of the integration to add

options.name: --source
options.description: The NuGet source to use for the integration

arguments.name: integration
arguments.description: The name of the integration to add (e.g. redis, postgres)

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Generate deployment artifacts for an apphost (Preview)

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --output-path
options.description: The output path for the generated artifacts. Defaults to './aspire-output' if not specified.

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the minimum log level for pipeline logging (trace, debug, information, warning, error, critical). The default is 'information'.

options.name: --environment
options.description: The environment to use for the operation. The default is 'Production'.

options.name: --include-exception-details
options.description: Include exception details (stack traces) in pipeline logs [default: False]

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Do not build or restore the project before running [default: False]

commands.name: config
commands.description: Manage CLI configuration including feature flags

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get a configuration value

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The configuration key to retrieve

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set a configuration value

options.name: --global
options.description: Set the configuration value globally in $HOME/.aspire/settings.json instead of the local settings file [default: False]

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The configuration key to set

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: The configuration value to set

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all configuration values

options.name: --all
options.description: Show all available features that can be configured [default: False]

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete a configuration value

options.name: --global
options.description: Delete the configuration value from the global $HOME/.aspire/settings.json instead of the local settings file [default: False]

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The configuration key to delete

commands.name: info
commands.description: Display configuration file paths and available features

options.name: --json
options.description: Output information in JSON format [default: False]

commands.name: cache
commands.description: Manage disk cache for CLI operations

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clear all cache entries

commands.name: certs
commands.description: Manage HTTPS development certificates

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Remove all HTTPS development certificates

commands.name: trust
commands.description: Trust the HTTPS development certificate, creating one if necessary

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Diagnose Aspire environment issues and verify setup

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploy an apphost to its deployment targets (Preview)

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --output-path
options.description: The optional output path for deployment artifacts

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the minimum log level for pipeline logging (trace, debug, information, warning, error, critical). The default is 'information'.

options.name: --environment
options.description: The environment to use for the operation. The default is 'Production'.

options.name: --include-exception-details
options.description: Include exception details (stack traces) in pipeline logs [default: False]

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Do not build or restore the project before running [default: False]

options.name: --clear-cache
options.description: Clear the deployment cache associated with the current environment and do not save deployment state [default: False]

commands.name: do
commands.description: Execute a specific pipeline step and its dependencies (Preview)

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --output-path
options.description: The optional output path for artifacts

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the minimum log level for pipeline logging (trace, debug, information, warning, error, critical). The default is 'information'.

options.name: --environment
options.description: The environment to use for the operation. The default is 'Production'.

options.name: --include-exception-details
options.description: Include exception details (stack traces) in pipeline logs [default: False]

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Do not build or restore the project before running [default: False]

arguments.name: step
arguments.description: The name of the step to execute

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update integrations in the Aspire project (Preview)

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --self
options.description: Update the Aspire CLI itself to the latest version [default: False]

options.name: --channel
options.description: Channel to update to (stable, daily)

options.name: --quality
options.description: Quality level to update to (stable, daily)

commands.name: extension
commands.description: Hidden command for extension integration

commands.name: get-apphosts
commands.description: Get AppHosts in the specified directory

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Interact with MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools exposed by Aspire resources

commands.name: tools
commands.description: List MCP tools exposed by running resources

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

commands.name: call
commands.description: Call an MCP tool on a running resource

options.name: --input
options.description: JSON input to pass to the tool

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

arguments.name: resource
arguments.description: The name of the resource that exposes the MCP tool

arguments.name: tool
arguments.description: The name of the MCP tool to call

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server (deprecated, use 'agent mcp')

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize MCP server configuration for detected agent environments (deprecated, use 'agent init')

commands.name: agent
commands.description: Manage AI agent environment configuration

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Start the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize agent environment configuration for detected agents

commands.name: otel
commands.description: View OpenTelemetry data (logs, spans, traces) from a running apphost

commands.name: logs
commands.description: View structured logs from the Dashboard telemetry API

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --follow
options.description: Stream telemetry in real-time as it arrives [default: False]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of items to return

options.name: --trace-id
options.description: Filter by trace ID

options.name: --severity
options.description: Filter logs by minimum severity (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical)

arguments.name: resource
arguments.description: Filter by resource name

commands.name: spans
commands.description: View spans from the Dashboard telemetry API

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --follow
options.description: Stream telemetry in real-time as it arrives [default: False]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of items to return

options.name: --trace-id
options.description: Filter by trace ID

options.name: --has-error
options.description: Filter by error status (true to show only errors, false to exclude errors)

arguments.name: resource
arguments.description: Filter by resource name

commands.name: traces
commands.description: View traces from the Dashboard telemetry API

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of items to return

options.name: --trace-id
options.description: Filter by trace ID

options.name: --has-error
options.description: Filter by error status (true to show only errors, false to exclude errors)

arguments.name: resource
arguments.description: Filter by resource name

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export telemetry and resource data to a zip file

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

options.name: --output
options.description: The output file path for the export zip file

arguments.name: resource
arguments.description: Export data only for the specified resource

commands.name: docs
commands.description: Browse and search Aspire documentation from aspire.dev

commands.description: List all available Aspire documentation pages

options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search Aspire documentation by keywords

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 5, max: 10)

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: The search query

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get the full content of a documentation page by its slug

options.name: --section
options.description: Return only the specified section of the page

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (Table or Json)

arguments.name: slug
arguments.description: The slug of the documentation page (e.g., 'redis-integration')

commands.name: secret

commands.description: Get a secret value

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The secret key to retrieve

commands.name: set

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The secret key (e.g., Azure:Location or Parameters:postgres-password)

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: The secret value to set

commands.name: sdk
commands.description: Commands for generating SDKs for building Aspire integrations in other languages.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate typed SDKs from an Aspire integration library for use in other languages.

options.name: --language
options.description: Target language for SDK generation (e.g., typescript)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated SDK files

arguments.name: integration
arguments.description: Path to the integration project (.csproj) to generate SDK from

commands.name: dump
commands.description: Dump ATS capabilities from Aspire integration libraries.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file. If not specified, outputs to stdout.

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: Pretty (default), Json (machine-readable), or Ci (stable text for diffing).

arguments.name: integrations
arguments.description: Integrations to scan. Each can be a .csproj path or a NuGet package in PackageName@Version format. If not specified, dumps core Aspire.Hosting capabilities.

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Restore dependencies and generate SDK code for an apphost

options.name: --apphost
options.description: The path to the Aspire apphost project file
